MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT CACH, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE ENTRY OF DEFAULT.

APPEARANCES: Keith Belt, 572-1987 pltf & opposing party in propria persona; Stephen A. Scott, Esq. of Hayes Scott Bonino Ellingson & McLay, LLP 650/486-2867 for deft & moving party.
